children.name: ValidateBuildRequest
children.purpose: Validate the incoming build_request for required fields and business rules
children.behavior: Check action is one of trigger/status/list/cancel; for trigger ensure repo and config present; for status/cancel ensure build_id present; enforce one build per repo+branch constraint for trigger
children.signature: def ValidateBuildRequest(build_request: dict, builds: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read builds to check one-build-per-repo-branch constraint

data_operations.description: Read existing builds to validate constraint

constraints.description: Must not modify builds or artifacts during validation

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns validated_request with defaults applied for valid input

children.name: TriggerBuild
children.purpose: Create a new build record, run compile and test steps, package artifacts, update status
children.behavior: Insert new build record with status 'running', execute compile step, then test step, on success package artifacts and set status 'completed', on failure set status 'failed'
children.signature: def TriggerBuild(validated_request: dict, builds: Database, artifacts: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Create new build record and update its status

data_operations.description: Insert build record and update status

constraints.description: Must not modify builds or artifacts outside of trigger operation

acceptance_criteria.description: Creates build record with initial status 'running'
Updates build status to 'completed' on success, 'failed' on failure

children.name: CheckBuildStatus
children.purpose: Return current status and logs for a given build_id
children.behavior: Look up build record by build_id, return its status and logs
children.signature: def CheckBuildStatus(validated_request: dict, builds: Database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Read build record to return status and logs

constraints.description: Must not modify builds or artifacts during status check

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns build_id, status, and logs for existing build

children.name: ListBuildHistory
children.purpose: Return all build records filtered by optional repo/branch/status
children.behavior: Query builds store, apply filters from validated_request (repo, branch, status), return list of matching builds
children.signature: def ListBuildHistory(validated_request: dict, builds: Database) -> list

global_vars.description: Read builds to apply filters and return list

data_operations.description: Read builds to filter and return matching records

constraints.description: Must not modify builds or artifacts during listing

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns list of builds matching filters
Returns empty list if no builds match

children.name: CancelBuild
children.purpose: Stop a running build and update its status to 'cancelled'
children.behavior: Look up build by build_id, if status is 'running' set status to 'cancelled' and stop execution; if already completed, no-op
children.signature: def CancelBuild(validated_request: dict, builds: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read build record and update its status to 'cancelled'

data_operations.description: Read build record and update status to 'cancelled'

constraints.description: Must not modify artifacts during cancellation

governance_notes: Parent global state conservation verified: builds (read_write) covered by ValidateBuildRequest (read), TriggerBuild (read_write), CheckBuildStatus (read), ListBuildHistory (read), CancelBuild (read_write). artifacts (read_write) covered by TriggerBuild (read_write). All parent operations assigned. No child invents new global vars.
